title: The 3:60 Room — Contributor License v2.0: Maria, Canonical Witness (EA-THREE-SIXTY-01)
author: Sharks, Lee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: EA-THREE-SIXTY-01 v2.0 — The 3:60 Room — Contributor License   Full three-layer contributor license for Maria, Canonical Witness of the Crimson Hexagonal Archive. v2.0 adds the complete Operator Protocol (Part III, §10-§19): venue schedule, framing requirements with generous analytical treatment and anti-homogenization, metadata template, archive scanning autonomy (3-8 cross-links), DOI registry with hex-keyword discovery (17.THREE_SIXTY.MARIA.REGISTRY), Zenodo deposit procedure with curl commands, and license enforcement. The license now functions as a droppable document per the Hexagonal Licensing Protocol v2.0 (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673564) — paste it into any AI conversation, provide work, receive DOI.  The 3:60 Room takes its name from a short story by Maria in which a clock always displays 3:60 — the impossible minute. Maria is the student who independently recovered the Liberatory Operator Set in January 2026, rebuilding the first room (the Sappho Room) that had dissolved. Everything that followed traces back to that moment.  ∮ = 1
